overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage follows a female character walking through a post-apocalyptic settlement built among rocky mountains and red-leaved trees. She traverses from a covered pavilion through open wetlands, passes a seated NPC among shipping containers, and enters a dark makeshift structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pavilion transitioning to open trail

events.description: exiting covered pavilion into open wetland area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered pavilion toward open landscape with mountains

notable_agents.action: standing near pavilion exit, then moving out of view

entered.detail: metal roof and support beams of open-air pavilion
trees with distinctive red foliage against mountain backdrop
tall rocky cliff faces forming the background

segments.scene_description: The character begins under a metal pavilion structure with concrete flooring, walking toward an open landscape dominated by rocky mountains and distinctive red-leaved trees. She passes a standing NPC near the pavilion exit as she transitions into the exposed trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wetland trail with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking along dirt path through sparse wetland vegetation toward distant settlement

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open expanse of dry grass and mud puddles, the character approaches a makeshift settlement of shipping containers nestled against towering rocky cliffs. The landscape is sparse with scattered vegetation under bright afternoon sun.

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight container corridors, approaching a seated individual

notable_agents.action: seated on stacked containers, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: yellow shipping container with fabric curtain door

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a cluttered settlement of dark shipping containers and scrap metal, passing an NPC seated on stacked containers. She approaches a yellow-curtained entrance set into the container wall, with industrial AC units and metal crates lining the path.

events.description: entering dark container interior from bright exterior sunlight
transitioning from outdoor settlement to enclosed indoor space

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark container interior toward a distant purple light source

entered.detail: dark corrugated metal walls of shipping container interior
mysterious purple illumination emanating from deep inside container
paper posters and notices attached to interior wall

segments.scene_description: Stepping through the yellow curtain into darkness, the character enters a narrow container corridor illuminated by a mysterious purple glow from within. The walls are lined with posters and metal shelving as she moves deeper into the makeshift shelter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pavilion through a rugged outdoor settlement and into a dimly lit interior. It begins under a metal pavilion with concrete flooring, moving past a standing NPC as the character transitions from the cover of the structure into an open landscape of rocky mountains and red-leaved trees. As she traverses an expanse of dry grass and mud puddles under the bright afternoon sun, the scene shifts toward a makeshift settlement of shipping containers nestled against towering cliffs. The camera then follows her through a cluttered corridor of scrap metal and industrial crates, passing a seated NPC before approaching a yellow-curtained entrance. Finally, the bright daylight vanishes as she steps through the curtain into a narrow container hallway illuminated by a mysterious purple glow and lined with metal shelving.
